name: pulsemesh
description: Local-first telemetry sensorium for AGNT. Runs live, cached, and synthetic telemetry meshes; emits summaries, dashboards, reports, baselines, history, comparisons, and gate decisions for agent workflows.
author: James Paul Jackson

schema.title: PulseMesh Demo Workflow
schema.description: Run the full PulseMesh workflow and emit summary, report, dashboard, baseline, and history artifacts.

profiles.description: Profile JSON path. Defaults to the bundled AGNT profile.

no_plots.description: Skip matplotlib plots for faster AGNT runs.

schema.title: PulseMesh Run
schema.description: Run one telemetry mesh from a profile file and return structured artifact paths.

schema.title: PulseMesh Latest Status
schema.description: Read the latest PulseMesh run and return mesh health, alerts, fallback status, and highest anomaly.

schema.title: PulseMesh Agent Gate
schema.description: Return go, warn, or hold based on latest telemetry health, anomalies, alerts, and fallback usage.

min_health.description: Hold below this mesh health score.

warn_health.description: Warn below this mesh health score.

max_anomaly.description: Hold at or above this anomaly score.

warn_anomaly.description: Warn at or above this anomaly score.

hold_on_critical.description: Hold when critical alerts are present.

warn_on_fallback.description: Warn when any sensor used fallback data.

schema.title: PulseMesh Dashboard
schema.description: Render or locate a self-contained PulseMesh HTML dashboard.

summary.description: Summary JSON path. Defaults to latest run summary.

out.description: Dashboard output path. Defaults beside the summary.

schema.title: PulseMesh Compare
schema.description: Compare two PulseMesh summaries, or the two most recent runs.

schema.title: PulseMesh Validate
schema.description: Validate a PulseMesh profile or summary JSON artifact.
